income_thresholds.description: BPL families and families with annual income below Rs 5 lakh are eligible for free coverage of Rs 2 lakh per family per year.
income_thresholds.source: Assam State Government / National Health Mission Assam

exclusion_rules.description: Only residents of Assam are eligible for Atal Amrit Abhiyan
Families with annual income above Rs 5 lakh are not eligible
Must be a BPL cardholder or have income below Rs 5 lakh to qualify
Families already covered under CGHS or ESIC are excluded
Only 492 disease categories across 12 specialties are covered. Diseases outside this list are not covered.

family_criteria.family_definition: Family as defined in BPL card or ration card. All members listed are covered under the scheme. Coverage is floater across all family members.

covered_procedures: Cardiology (bypass surgery, angioplasty, valve replacement, pacemaker implantation)
Orthopaedic (knee replacement, hip replacement, fracture management)
Diagnostics and lab tests during hospitalization
excluded_procedures: Dental treatment (unless related to covered surgery)

required_documents.name: Aadhaar Card
required_documents.notes: Required for identity verification and e-KYC at empanelled hospitals

required_documents.name: BPL Card / NFSA Card
required_documents.notes: Proof of BPL status or income eligibility. Income certificate must show annual income below Rs 5 lakh.

required_documents.name: Income Certificate
required_documents.notes: Issued by Circle Officer or Deputy Commissioner office. Required if BPL card is not available.

required_documents.name: Residency Proof
required_documents.notes: Must prove current residence in Assam

required_documents.name: Recent Passport-size Photograph
required_documents.notes: Required for Atal Amrit Abhiyan card generation

enrollment_steps: Step 1: Visit the nearest empanelled hospital or District Health Office with required documents.
Step 2: Submit Aadhaar card, BPL card or income certificate, and residency proof.
Step 3: Undergo biometric verification (fingerprint/iris scan) for e-KYC.
Step 4: Atal Amrit Abhiyan card is generated with family member details.
Step 5: Card is activated immediately. Present at any empanelled hospital in Assam for cashless treatment up to Rs 2 lakh.
Step 6: For treatment, visit empanelled hospital with Atal Amrit card and Aadhaar. Hospital verifies and provides cashless care.
description_for_embedding: Atal Amrit Abhiyan is Assam's state health insurance scheme providing Rs 2 lakh per family per year for BPL families and families with annual income below Rs 5 lakh. The scheme covers 492 disease categories across 12 medical specialties including cardiology, oncology, nephrology, neurosurgery, orthopaedics, and urology. Treatment is cashless at empanelled government and private hospitals across Assam. Enrollment is through empanelled hospitals and district health offices with Aadhaar, BPL card, and residency proof. The scheme particularly benefits tea garden workers, daily wage labourers, and other economically weaker sections in Assam. Helpline number is 104.
